data.summary: Drafting follow-up email for Magnolia Home & Garden based on recent account activity.

steps.result: Magnolia Home & Garden — open balance $18,200, last order Mar 15

fields.label: Subject
fields.value: Following up on your recent order — Magnolia Home & Garden

fields.label: Body
fields.value:
Hi Rachel,

I wanted to follow up on order ORD-LATEST from March 15th — let us know if everything arrived as expected or if there's anything we can help with.

Also, your current balance is $18,200. If you'd like to discuss payment terms or place your next order, I'm happy to help coordinate.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Best,
Heman Bhullar
WizCommerce Sales

closingText.text: Draft ready — professional tone, references the recent order and open balance. Want me to make it shorter, adjust the tone, or send it?
